[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111 a
1 1111111 a
2 1111111 a
3 1111111 a
4 1111110 6
5 1011111 6
6 1110111 6
7 1111110 6

01 1001111 5
12 1100100 3
23 1010001 3

45 1011000 3
56 1111110 6 match 4 7
67 0000001 1
70 0100110 3
